title: Looting for All
description: A simple datapack that allows looting to be put on all weapons, not just swords.
body:
This is a simple datapack that allows you to enchant the following weapons with looting, in addition to swords.

- Axes
- Maces
- Bows
- Crossbows
- Tridents

These weapons can be enchanted with looting using the enchantment table, as well as with an anvil.
